messages.content: My name is Alice and I work on feature X

Got it, Alice! I'll remember that you work on feature X. How can I help you today? Whether it's questions, brainstorming, troubleshooting, or anything else related to feature X (or beyond), feel free to ask!
What is my name and what feature am I working on?
Your name is **Alice** and you are working on **feature X**. 😊
